evidenceTrail.source: r/copywriting on Reddit: How much should i charge for email services?
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: I'd only pay someone $100/email that has proven numbers to back up that rate. I'm just being real, maybe you're an A-lister but if so, I don't think you'd be asking how much to charge on Reddit.

evidenceTrail.source: How Much Does Email Marketing Cost? (2026 Breakdown)
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: In-house team (marketer + designer + copywriter): $5K–$15K/month ... This cost can vary a lot by how much effort you put into your email campaigns, and how much importance you place on copy and creative.

evidenceTrail.source: How much should I charge to send emails to my mailing list? - Quora
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: Answer (1 of 3): To expand on Nidhi's answer, The method is to send your email (work with your client to get the correct sales pitch, but presented to your audience in your voice) and include a trackable link to a landing page at his site that is created just for your sales pitch. Tracking from...

evidenceTrail.source: Email Marketing Pricing: What Your Business Should Expect
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: Email marketing costs can vary depending on the services you request. A full campaign will cost $350 - $4,000 . Learn what factors influence the price here!

evidenceTrail.source: What Is the Average Cost of Email Marketing?
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: Here’s how much digital marketing teams spend on their email marketing each year: The majority of marketers spend between $1,001 and $5,000 a year , with one in ten dedicating over $10,000 of their budget to email marketing.

evidenceTrail.whatItProves: <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5" target="_blank">Roundtable CEO James Heckman Executes $75M Merger Agreement with RYVYL to Power Web3 Digital Media Platform on a Bitcoin Treasury Ecosystem</a> <font color="#6f6f6f">thestreet.com</font>

evidenceTrail.source: Roundtable CEO James Heckman Executes $75M Merger Agreement with RYVYL to Power Web3 Digital Media Platform on a Bitcoin Treasury Ecosystem - TheStreet Crypto: Bitcoin and cryptocurrency news, advice, analysis and more
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: The proposed merger synchronizes the two companies’ SaaS-powered treasury strategy, designed to provide instant, decentralized liquidity for clients and balance sheet support for innovation. Serial media platform pioneer and Roundtable founder James Heckman will be the CEO of the combined company at close of the transaction, while RYVYL’s board has named current CFO George Oliva as interim CEO and Chairman during the transition period.

evidenceTrail.source: Roundtable CEO James Heckman Executes $75M Merger Agreement with RYVYL to Power Web3 Digital Media Platform on a Bitcoin Treasury Ecosystem
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: James Heckman founded and led Maven (NYSE: AREN), which grew into a nine-figure, NYSE public company providing publishing, distribution and monetization for 300 brands, including Sports Illustrated, Maxim, History.com, and TheStreet, and reaching over 150 million users monthly.

evidenceTrail.source: Roundtable CEO James Heckman Executes $75M Merger Agreement with RYVYL to Power Web3 Digital Media Platform on a Bitcoin Treasury Ecosystem - The Globe and Mail
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: Roundtable’s brand, technology and SaaS network will combine with RYVYL’s digital payment infrastructure, to accelerate revenue and distribution growth for Roundtable’s premium media clients, such as Yahoo, TheStreet and Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) European Football Club.

evidenceTrail.source: Roundtable CEO James Heckman on why most crypto treasury mergers fail — and how Roundtable is different
evidenceTrail.whatItProves: Hertzog, best known as the co-founder of Bancor and inventor of automated market-making, the protocol that underpins DeFi liquidity pools is building Roundtable’s decentralized architecture. The platform aims to give major media brands like TheStreet, Yahoo, and Paris Saint-Germain’s media arm real-time, on-chain payments and transparent data ownership.
